title: PnR Coverage Recognition v0 / DROP Foundations
description: Pack 2 (Phase β/γ/δ). Real DROP (READ_THE_COVERAGE) base scenarios — single-freeze ball-handler reads of screen-defender posture. D1 ships the textbook drop pull-up; D2 introduces the deep-drop snake variant; D3 layers a second cue (weak-side low-man tag) and the kick-the-tag read.
